name: Apple Nut Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
About 2 hours before serving or early in the day:
Prepare Streusel topping: In a bowl, mix 1 cup chopped walnuts, 2/3 cup all-purpose flour, ¼ cup packed brown sugar, and 4 tablespoons margarine or butter. Stir in 1 teaspoon cinnamon.
Set aside. Peel, core, and thinly slice apples. Toss apples with 2 tablespoons sugar.
Grease a 14" x 10-inch roasting pan.
Preheat oven to 350°F.
In a large bowl, beat margarine with 1½ cups sugar until light and fluffy. Add sour cream and remaining ingredients; beat at low speed until blended, scraping the bowl frequently.
Beat in eggs on medium speed for 1 minute.
Spread batter in pan, arrange apple slices on top. Sprinkle with Streusel Topping.
Bake 45 to 50 minutes until cake pulls away from sides of pan. Cool in pan on a wire rack for 10 minutes or cool to serve later. Makes 18 servings.
Nutrition:
395 calories, 23g fat, 58 mg cholesterol, 340 mg sodium.
